content:
- **Backend**: Python FastAPI (`backend/`) — routers pattern, loaded from `backend/main.py`
- **Frontend**: Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind v4 (`frontend/`)
- **Scraper Pipeline**: Python CLI tool (`backend/scraper/`) — 4-stage pipeline
- **Data**: `backend/data/` — JSON files, raw HTML cache

- `backend/agents.py` — School DB loader, LangChain agents, RAG engine
- `backend/routers/schools.py` — School directory + odds calculator API
- `backend/routers/scraper.py` — Pipeline status/stats endpoints (NEW)
- `backend/scraper/run.py` — CLI orchestrator: `python -m backend.scraper.run <cmd>`
- `frontend/src/app/school/[schoolId]/page.tsx` — School detail page
- `frontend/src/app/schools/page.tsx` — School directory listing
- `docs/plans/2026-03-12-mba-scraper-pipeline.md` — Implementation

- **Stage 1**: Discovery — ranking site scraping, seed schools, dedup
- **Stage 1.5**: URL Resolution — Google search for missing websites
- **Stage 2**: Crawl — Playwright page capture with resume support
- **Stage 3**: Extract — Claude API structured extraction
- **Stage 4**: Merge — overlay scraped data on existing DB
- **Tests**: 12 unit tests in `backend/scraper/test_*.py`
- **Blocker**: No `.env` with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — extraction fails

- `agents.py` now overlays scraped data at load time (`_overlay_scraped_data`)
- School API responses include `data_source` and `data_confidence` fields
- School detail API includes full `data_quality_summary` object
- Frontend shows "Verified Data" / "AI-Generated Data" badges
- Per-section verified indicators on essay prompts, deadlines, placement stats
- New endpoints: `/api/scraper/status`, `/api/scraper/stats`

- 1,198 total entries in `school_db_full.json` (mostly synthetic)
- 254 "real" schools after hex-ID filtering
- 4 schools crawled (HBS, Stanford, Wharton, IIM Ahmedabad)
- 0 successfully extracted (API key missing)

- School IDs: lowercase slugs (e.g., `hbs`, `gsb`, `wharton`, `iima`)
- Synthetic schools: hex-hash IDs > 6 chars, filtered at load time
- Data quality: `data_quality` dict with `verified_fields`, `confidence`, `last_scraped`
- Frontend: editorial design system with `heading-serif`, `editorial-card`, gold/jet colors

- [Ruflo v3.5 Integration](project_ruflo_integration.md) — agent orchestration, self-learning, cost optimization
- [Competitive Analysis](../../docs/research/2026-03-15-competitive-analysis.md) — market research on MBA admissions platforms

name: ruflo-integration
description: Ruflo v3.5 agent orchestration platform integrated into project for multi-agent swarms, self-learning, and cost optimization
type: project
---

Ruflo v3.5.15 installed globally and initialized in the MBA admissions project (2026-03-15).

**Why:** Increase development productivity via multi-agent coordination, persistent learning across sessions, and intelligent task routing (simple tasks to Haiku, complex to Opus).

**How to apply:**
